text: Also  in  the  event  GS  Construction  Mountain,  LLC  supervisors  or  safety  inspectors  notice  a condition posing imminent danger to any worker on a jobsite, such condition shall be immediately corrected upon verbal notice of GS Construction Mountain, LLC supervision or safety inspectors. The  failure to promptly  correct any  unsafe conditions constituting  imminent  danger  to subcontractor's employees or the employees of any other employer on the jobsite, shall give GS Construction Mountain, LLC the right to direct an immediate cessation of  the
